auth.login_desc: Enter your details to access the dashboard.
auth.register_desc: Join hundreds of investors who control their construction projects.
auth.magiclink_desc: Enter your email, and you'll receive a secure link for one-time login.
auth.forgot_password: Forgot password? Log in with a one-time link.
auth.hero_desc: Ditch chaotic spreadsheets. Keep costs in check, verify progress with ready-to-use checklists, and store all contracts and receipts in one place.
auth.social_proof: Join the pioneers of digital construction.

hero.title: Build your home
hero.description: Have full control over your budget, manage contractors, track progress with over 280 checkpoints, and keep all contracts in one secure place.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Planer Budowy replaces dozens of Excel sheets, lost receipts, and scribbles with one cohesive system.
features.budget_desc: Track every penny. Assign expenses to specific stages, monitor deviations from the baseline budget, and view clear charts (Recharts) to know exactly if you'll have enough funds until the end.
features.checklists_desc: Ready-to-use, professional inspection templates for 7 construction stages. From foundations and reinforcements to facades. Don't get cheated on site.
features.timeline_desc: Plan upcoming crews without stress. Drag stage tiles in any order on an interactive list to arrange the chronology of work as you wish.
features.files_desc: No more searching for receipts in pocket linings. Upload invoice photos, scans of approved designs directly to a safe integrated with your project. Additionally, we offer ready-to-use contract templates (e.g., General Contractor agreement).

cta.title: Build your home on a solid foundation...
cta.subtitle: of planning.
cta.description: Start using the platform for free. No credit cards, no hidden fees.
cta.button: Create account and add your first project

alerts.over_budget_plural: Budget of selected projects exceeded by {amount} zł!

projects.title: Your Projects
projects.delete_shared_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this project from your account? This will not delete the project for the owner.
projects.delete_owner_confirm: Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY delete this project? This operation cannot be undone.
projects.no_projects: You don't have any projects yet.
projects.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project?

checklists.title: Your Checklists
checklists.page_subtitle: Quality control tools for every construction stage
checklists.no_items_details: No tasks. Click + to add the first one.
checklists.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this checklist?
checklists.template_info: This list was created from a template.
checklists.templates_banner_desc: Ready-to-use checklists: foundations (54 pts), slab (30 pts), shell (92 pts), windows (13 pts), installations (78 pts), insulation (13 pts), facade (18 pts).
checklists.no_checklists_desc: You don't have any checklists for the selected projects yet. Add a new list from a template or create your own.

documents.title: Document TEMPLATES
documents.page_subtitle: Ready-to-use construction document and contract templates. Copy the content, fill in your details, and sign with the contractor.

settings.account_subtitle: Manage your profile details, avatar, and security.
settings.email_readonly_info: Email can only be changed in the main auth settings.
settings.password_hint: Note: Password must contain at least 8 characters, including a number and a special character.

team.title: Team & Sharing
team.description: Manage access to this project. Team members can edit stages and expenses (Editor) or only view them (Viewer).
team.remove_member_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this person from the project?
team.error_duplicate: This user is already in the team.

files.title: Files & Documents
files.subtitle: Receipts, contracts, photos from construction
files.no_files_details: No files. Upload your first document.
files.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
files.drag_drop_subtitle: or click to select from disk (PDF, JPG, PNG)

stages.title: Construction Stages
stages.no_stages: No stages. Add your first stage to get started.
stages.delete_stage_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this stage along with all its expenses?
stages.suggested_title: Enter your own name or choose below...
stages.no_timeline_details: Add start and end dates to construction stages.
